name: Twin Oaks Pickleball
description: Twin Oaks Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bismarck, AR. There are 5 asphalt and concrete courts. 4 are outdoors and 1 is indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like lights, trainers or lessons, restrooms, and youth programming. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Indoor is a 2 hour rental at $40.  Outdoor is currently free but will be $5 drop in fee in the future.
